Node.help: Manages a range of IP addresses within a IpV4V6 stack element plugin.

PropertyNode.help: The MAC range from the Ethernet plugin used to associate the interfaces from. See MacRange for more details.
PropertyNode.name: macRange

PropertyNode.help: The VlanId range from the Ethernet plugin used to associate the Vlan info from. See VlanIdRange for more details.
PropertyNode.name: vlanRange

PropertyNode.help: The ATM range from the ATM plugin used to associate the ATM info from. See AtmRange for more details.
PropertyNode.name: atmRange

PropertyNode.help: The PVC range from the ATM plugin used to associate the PVC info from. See PvcRange for more details.
PropertyNode.name: pvcRange

Method2.name: AutoGenerateMacRange
Method2.help: Generate or remove a MAC range on demand.

Argument.name: generate
Argument.help: If this field is true generate a new mac range. If the value is set to false the mac range associated is deleted.

Argument.name: success
Argument.help: Return value is true if the range was generated.

Method2.name: AutoGenerateAtmRange
Method2.help: Generate or remove an ATM range on demand.

Argument.name: success
Argument.help: Return value is true if the range was generated.

Method2.name: AutoGeneratePvcRange
Method2.help: Generate or remove a PVC range on demand.

Argument.name: success
Argument.help: Return value is true if the range was generated.

PropertyBoolean.name: generateStatistics
PropertyBoolean.help: If this value is true, statistics will be generated for this range.

PropertyBoolean.name: enabled
PropertyBoolean.help: If this value is false, the range is not included in the configuration.

PropertyString.name: ipType
PropertyString.help: Defines the version of IP address style to be used for describing the range.

PropertyString.name: ipAddress
PropertyString.help: Defines the base address to be used for enumerating all the addresses in the range.

PropertyString.name: incrementBy
PropertyString.help: Defines the increment to be used for enumerating all the addresses in the range.

PropertyString.name: gatewayAddress
PropertyString.help: Defines the gateway to be associated with all the addresses created in the range.

PropertyInt.name: prefix
PropertyInt.help: Defines the length (in bits) of the mask to be used in conjunction with all the addresses created in the range. e.g., a prefix of 24 = 255.255.255.0 for IPv4.

PropertyInt.name: count
PropertyInt.help: The total number of addresses to be created for the range.

PropertyInt.name: mss
PropertyInt.help: The Maximum Segment Size, defines the maximum length of the data. TCP MSS = MTU - TCP header size - IP header size. Theoretically, this value can be as large as 65495, but such a large value is never used For Ethernet the maximum value for MSS is 1460 = 1500-40.

PropertyNode.name: dhcpSettings
PropertyNode.help: Object representing properties used by DHCP.

PropertyBoolean.name: autoMacGeneration
PropertyBoolean.description: If set, MAC addresses will be auto-generated based on IP
